title: Important Dates for IISc BS Admissions 2026

detail.title: Important Dates for IISc BS Admissions 2026
detail.short_info: IISc BS Admission 2026 is open now. Apply online for the 4-Year Bachelor of Science (Research) programme from 1 May to 4 June 2026 at IISc Bangalore. Check eligibility, important dates, fees, and selection process.

content.text: IISc BS Admissions 2026 applications are now open. The Indian Institute of Science (IISc) Bangalore has invited online applications for the prestigious Four-Year Bachelor of Science (Research) programme for the academic session 2026-27. Interested candidates can apply online from 1 May 2026 to 4 June 2026.

sections.heading: Important Dates for IISc BS Admissions 2026

rows: Last Date to Submit Online Application
Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics as main subjects
60% or equivalent (First Class) for General/OBC/EWS Pass Class for SC/ST candidates

content.text: Admission to IISc BS (Research) 2026 will be based on merit in any one of the following national-level exams:

sections.heading: How to Apply for IISc BS Admissions 2026

items: Visit the official admission portal: admissions-august.iisc.ac.in
Register using a valid email ID and mobile number.
Fill in personal, academic, and contact details.
Enter the details of JEE Advanced / IAT score (as applicable).
Pay the application fee (if applicable) and submit the form.
Download and print the confirmation page.
